name: Sauteed String Beans
recipeIngredient: 34 ounces (2 cans) whole string beans, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow, 1-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic baking dish, melt butter or margarine in Microwave Oven for 30 seconds.
2. Add string beans and heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 5 minutes or until heated through.
3. Add remaining ingredients and toss lightly to coat all beans with butter sauce. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes.
